evals.prompt: Create a 3-slide IBM Carbon deck about cloud migration strategy. Slide 1 should be a title slide, slide 2 should have 3 pillar cards (Assess, Migrate, Optimize) with gradient top accent bars and icons, and slide 3 should be a closing slide. Use Carbon design tokens throughout. Output as migration-strategy.pptx.
evals.expected_output: A valid .pptx file with 3 slides: title (full-bleed image or programmatic), 3-pillar content slide with gradient accent bars and icons, and a closing slide. All using Carbon tokens, shadow factories, correct hex format.

assertions.text: Output file migration-strategy.pptx exists and is valid
Uses shadow factory pattern (not shared shadow objects)
No # prefix on pptxgenjs color values
Uses renderGradientBar for accent bars with h >= 0.08
All async functions are awaited
slide.background set to white on content slides

evals.prompt: I need to build an IBM-branded proposal deck with 4 slides using pptxgenjs and Carbon Design System. The deck is for 'Digital Transformation Services'. Slide 1: title. Slide 2: 4 challenge cards in a 2x2 grid with left gradient accent bars and icons. Slide 3: timeline with 3 phase cards and arrow connectors. Slide 4: outcomes with a bottom callout bar. Make sure everything uses proper Carbon tokens.
evals.expected_output: A valid .pptx with 4 slides using IBM Carbon styling. Challenge cards with vertical gradient left accents, timeline with arrow icons (not LINE shapes), callout bar with tint colors. All Carbon tokens applied correctly.

assertions.text: Output .pptx file exists and is valid
Uses renderVerticalGradientBar for left accent bars
Uses FaArrowRight icons (not LINE shapes) for timeline arrows
Callout bar uses matching tint color from Tint Color Guide
Font sizes are 9pt or larger throughout
Shadow factory pattern used consistently

evals.prompt: Build me a simple 2-slide IBM Carbon PPTX. First slide is a programmatic title (no HTML capture needed). Second slide has 3 metric callout cards showing KPIs with gradient top accent bars. Use the green/teal/blue Carbon accent colors. The deck should be called 'Q4-Performance-Review.pptx'.
evals.expected_output: A valid Q4-Performance-Review.pptx with programmatic title slide and 3 metric cards with gradient top accents in green/teal/blue. Correct Carbon tokens, no corrupted OOXML.

assertions.text: Output file Q4-Performance-Review.pptx exists
Programmatic title slide (no HTML capture)
Uses gradient color triplets from the skill's table
renderGradientBar called with borderRadius=0 and rect height uses actual height (not borderRadius*2=0)
Metric numbers use Arial Black 24-36pt
No gradient fill objects (only solid fills + SVG workaround)

evals.prompt: Build a single-slide IBM Carbon deck called 'strategic-impact.pptx'. The slide shows 4 compounding value cards in a horizontal row. Each card has: a gradient accent bar at the top (with borderRadius for rounded cards), a step number ('01', '02', '03', '04'), a gradient hero title rendered as SVG→PNG (e.g., 'Establish', 'Enable', 'Accelerate', 'Scale'), a subtitle, a divider line, 4 bullet items, another divider, and outcome text. Cards use ROUNDED_RECTANGLE with per-card tinted backgrounds. FaArrowRight connectors between cards. Include a bottom callout bar with rich text. Use a pixel-to-inch conversion helper.
evals.expected_output: A valid strategic-impact.pptx with 1 content slide containing 4 compounding value cards in a row. Each card uses ROUNDED_RECTANGLE with tinted bg, gradient accent bar (borderRadius > 0), renderGradientTitle for hero text, step numbers, divider lines, and outcome text. Arrow connectors between cards.

assertions.text: Output file strategic-impact.pptx exists and is valid
Uses renderGradientTitle to render gradient hero text as SVG→PNG
Uses ROUNDED_RECTANGLE (not plain RECTANGLE) for card backgrounds
Each card has a unique tinted background color (not all gray10)
renderGradientBar called with borderRadius > 0 for rounded card accent bars
Uses LINE shapes for dividers inside cards
FaArrowRight icons between cards (3 arrows for 4 cards)
Shadow factory pattern used consistently
Pixel-to-inch helper function defined (e.g., v / 192)
Slide header title and subtitle do not visually overlap (title.y + title.h <= subtitle.y)

evals.prompt: Build a 5-slide IBM Carbon proposal deck using the hybrid approach. Title: 'Technology Services Proposal'. Slide 1: HTML capture title slide using the bundled capture-title.mjs script — embed as full-bleed PNG. Slide 2: 'The Challenge' with 4 risk/challenge cards in a 2×2 grid, each with left vertical gradient accent bars and icons. Slide 3: 'Value Proposition' with 3 pillar cards showing what the service delivers. Slide 4: 'Pre-requisites' with 4 narrow columns — the last card should be highlighted as REQUIRED with a filled badge, tinted background, and colored border. Slide 5: HTML capture closing/thank-you slide as full-bleed PNG. Output as 'technology-services-proposal.pptx'.
evals.expected_output: A valid 5-slide PPTX using hybrid approach: HTML-captured title and closing slides (full-bleed PNGs) plus 3 programmatic content slides. Challenge slide with 2×2 grid and vertical gradient bars. Value pillar slide with 3 columns. Prerequisites slide with 4 narrow columns including a REQUIRED badge on the last card.

assertions.text: Output file technology-services-proposal.pptx exists and is valid
Slides 1 and 5 use addImage with full-bleed dimensions (w:10, h:5.625) for HTML-captured PNGs
Uses capture-title.mjs script (or equivalent HTML capture) for title and closing slides
Challenge slide uses 2×2 grid layout with vertical gradient accent bars
Prerequisites slide has a REQUIRED badge (ROUNDED_RECTANGLE with filled accent color and white text)
Mandatory/required card has tinted background color and colored border (line property)
Shadow factory pattern used consistently
No # prefix on pptxgenjs color values
All async functions are awaited
slide.background set to white on content slides
